query:
-- Classify NBN/internet bundle line items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'nbn'
WHERE (description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
    OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied mobile broadband%'
    OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle - Recurring%')
  AND (description LIKE '%internet%' OR description LIKE '%NBN%' OR description LIKE '%Connectivity%' OR description LIKE '%broadband%');

-- Classify 4G SIM backup items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = '4g_sim'
WHERE description LIKE '%4G SIM Backup%'
   OR description LIKE '%4G Back%'
   OR (description LIKE '%4G%' AND description LIKE '%backup%');

-- Classify hardware items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'hardware'
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel Hardware%'
   OR description LIKE '%TP-Link%'
   OR description LIKE '%Router%'
   OR description LIKE '%Omada%'
   OR description LIKE '%VoIP gateway%'
   OR description LIKE '%cordless phone%';

-- Classify SIP channel items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'sip_channels'
WHERE description LIKE '%SIP%'
   OR description LIKE '%Channels Business%'
   OR (description LIKE '%Voice%' AND description LIKE '%Channel%');

-- Classify installation/one-time items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'installation'
WHERE description LIKE '%Installation%'
   OR description LIKE '%one time%'
   OR description LIKE '%one-time%'
   OR description LIKE '%Number porting%';

-- Classify support items
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'support'
WHERE description LIKE '%Support%'
   AND retailBundleComponent = '';

-- Classify voice usage items for retail customers
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'voice_usage'
WHERE (description LIKE '%Voice - Telephone Usage%'
    OR description LIKE '%Local%'
    OR description LIKE '%National%'
    OR description LIKE '%Regional%'
    OR description LIKE '%Mobile%'
    OR description LIKE '%13Number%')
  AND retailBundleComponent = ''
  AND contactName IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT contactName FROM (
      SELECT contactName FROM billing_items 
      WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%'
         OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
    ) AS retail_contacts
  );

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
